textByHashes.601ac68186fcc72927e27f5852980aa5e53d34a8: That holy mace of Big High War God.
textByHashes.95e96f1c080288d2d7eb6cc4923ab29a5164656c: They use them to take favour of gods away from enemy. If another god protecting enemy, goblin warrior use this mace and favour of god is stolen away!
textByHashes.78b6c1a107cd791dd36e54fd01052532e31ed3d8: You should praise Big High War God for giving you holy mace!
textByHashes.e81accf7fb0e793f1eb248fd5a5d03c10f830468: You not real goblin! You filthy human!
textByHashes.cae5eee6693d933f6fd8ad417fefb20e9308376a: You not even look like goblin! You have big eyes and wrong colour skin!
textByHashes.694dfe61c4ad68a2656fced006588acd121bfd81: That not true! She cannot be Chosen Commander! She not proper goblin! She not worship Big High War God!
textByHashes.82a832385764f3cbe9884db4d8f1c74db51f461b: All right. I not believe you Chosen Commander. But we let you talk to people in village.
textByHashes.a1b0c5487fd3e53b651a28a3d8ed7d851cd0e045: Human will need help. You take our best warrior, Sergeant Mossfists.
textByHashes.4f46a77ac86d5d9cf18aca7bc50fb619e49087e6: Grubfoot! Fetch Mossfists and Slimetoes and tell them to meet in Lumbridge Swamp!
textByHashes.ce0499065ac7666245cb695bf79f6d9f6f5e1fcd: You take ancient goblin mace. Maybe it be useful.
textByHashes.42c40856483d2ba81f09232f4aaff12043f29e5b: Pink robe man say they digging tunnel under Lumbridge Swamp Caves. You go there to rescue Chosen Commander.
textByHashes.e4653cb9177ae4890aae96bfb8caad28e1a346ac: Me tell you human not clever enough! He lose mace.
textByHashes.aeb50de84d139916fd54d53f4458cc29102d0075: You stupid human! You not have enough money!
textByHashes.10bcf1c70762fa77cbdcbaf844ede89d31132ff2: You take ancient goblin mace now and rescue Chosen Commander!
textByHashes.1a38fb05abab403f5edbc5c5b4c5b67e2e755389: Well then, human no get mace.
textByHashes.b741e56de2bf925c45a5002d788301b16659719f: So if you care about big-eyed friend, you find 1,000 coins!
textByHashes.06bfa01624527a168f6cc035ce7b7da392468e82: Wormbrain steals too much. He got caught. Now he lives in Port Sarim town jail.
textByHashes.cd71bad6445edd44e5ba702ae2305208d6abffc4: All goblins should wear red armour!
textByHashes.4740bf8d68d8e76d82fda6730eaabb5bdcee0922: Even this human think you look fat! Don't you, human?
textByHashes.93eb6f5f4025cbc24d1516cc07dfae203cb9c6bd: Ha ha! See, fatty? Even human think you fat!
textByHashes.fc9db0e4e779a80220465eff6053105dca56c7b4: We decide to celebrate goblin new century by changing colour of our armour. Brown get boring after a bit. We want change.
textByHashes.1cdc9a92fae5b4da95cf7e38efb5bb60abd2e8c6: Thorobshuun tribe colour is red! Way better than silly green of Garagorshuun tribe.
textByHashes.10661cd0e405fc81469081872eb44fdec18646ae: Goblin century mark year of battle on Plain of Mud. That when Big High War God give goblin commandments.
textByHashes.88d93f0e311545b3799210227e282b570ca6033f: Me bet Big High War God would pick red armour.
textByHashes.a63bab92ebe118efaaa667ecd38e606dd3da84e3: But green too much like skin. Nearly make you look naked!
textByHashes.b8bd3d9d430d9928ef25f2b3b9e60a41b9612934: No you have to pick red!
textByHashes.976418d70a8c7d2a394e6b55ab28e5535122ee35: See? Even stupid human think red best. Now we all wear red!
textByHashes.6ac9088dd1c13d5684146d8df40ff36b57fe06a7: Go away human. You not helping.
textByHashes.0d4d151ae38cd230dc13bcebd2d44ca9ff638145: Why we have to do what human say? He not boss of us!
textByHashes.792ec40b9bad0fc375b7343b164a0077c59cb572: That prove you a filthy human-lover!
textByHashes.033961dde4d0dd5df38c247c094034297acf04b0: Go away human. You not know anything.
textByHashes.c193dc63a0b4c3f057499a3a1e171a04c2b24e72: That would mean me wrong... but at least Wartface not right!
textByHashes.e544493f35215695af1654f4915623533b285c5e: Human! You bring us armour in new colour!
textByHashes.e5ef656738b0ff0b2db9681f7f21a1b495c37115: Well first you get goblin armour...
textByHashes.224848b42e5fac37c8255abcbe791ce475fdb02f: Even human should be able to work that out!
textByHashes.7f104c38d2cb09c9a16abe5b73948e33a660228b: It in crates somewhere. Can't remember which crates now.
textByHashes.5884f3444d94fe9d89c866572afe9d2e3da5f3e1: You go north of here into wilderness. There you find many ways to die!
textByHashes.2a0c822907810811f879d46e267052617f2da799: Me not know where dye come from.
textByHashes.6499c7290928a6e8b3a9ce14193513db35e3f996: Maybe you can get more dye from her?
textByHashes.70c48fa35182fccd8c3ff95d76535c2acca3cc84: Shut up human! Wartface fat and human stupid!
textByHashes.74ccf2add7111fdcf82aee99978b711d0cd567d6: They not listen to you! I already tell them wear red armour!
textByHashes.815960e0d3c24a8bf63f8af61bcd0cc3634345ea: Me bigger general! They listen to me!
textByHashes.8e556a0458e6e406da1e575bdfc79b8337886c62: Human scared of me not you? Then you think me bigger general!
textByHashes.860c8e2ed97fdc0c3368e748535ba8b6c45da10e: No they don't! Me think red armour better!
textByHashes.d0f705a86b04e3eb2a8d459bec19c1daa6498b3f: That not right. Not goblin colour at all.
textByHashes.acb4a711e5f83d4cb5c1c422668d891ae4d03a67: It a deal then. Brown armour it is.
textByHashes.8f4b41842f32a7d4b33634d823e3bdaf77e1be63: No you weren't! That was me!
textByHashes.dadb124eaa9e73355711a962c09b9707b227236f: All me remember is Wartface stealin' chair!
textByHashes.a8c1dcd63a51bbb1b1cbed2a1b4c0fdde71c7cf9: I there before you were. So I get chair...
textByHashes.67a5890353ce5aefac0ae0697f8f54c1953e0e17: Dorgeshuun? That old goblin legend. Lost tribe.
textByHashes.758f293ac01ece465e8cfb87c6e44947ae9727cf: No no, he send them to fight tall people with biting blades, that what I hear.
textByHashes.465a2451d5f0f6d07bc76958c06ad7f26696efeb: It was tall people! That what old storyteller say!
textByHashes.3d33a7fb9943a4c952d5e7b0396fe2e34514e024: That most stupid idea yet. If it happen it either happen one way or the other. You can't just decide which.
textByHashes.124e0097fc5eaf14cd8f0102926f6a7c2b31862e: That silly. No goblin ever say that.
textByHashes.316a3a21a60d1ceac473f750168df10123ef06b2: They lose battle, that why god punish them.
textByHashes.bf190e87dae1fd0dd3bf75e44f96d2e749913a5a: No no, they losing so they run away, and Big High War-God punish them for running away.
textByHashes.8148b02fa88480e1b75911933980c3e4250cac62: No no, it was tall people.
textByHashes.f02e3592ac0034760b693b26f27c8202e4e1539b: Shh! Must not question Big High War-God!
textByHashes.d1942966509e00d1bded616427ae81488093d20d: Anyway then Big High War-God punish them. He turn their insides to stone.
textByHashes.0d77cd8ee782e5495c22dcb6f9f67a5542c169d9: Not as silly as green armour! What happen then?
textByHashes.265e9e21f1f2c0fb20b4841d90eb88a7b7093627: That not punishment! Caves nice and cool.
textByHashes.376ec14749f55e97a97d29e24bf9653e39703936: No, it because they refuse to fight night before battle.
textByHashes.37a0f4588b23b0e7a6288a1bcafaa66ea4ed4130: That not look like goblin brooch.
textByHashes.db76ab1a59453cb297e655c1740e09373a39790b: Well if it Dorgeshuun tribe they not know who won big wars. You should greet them with goblin victory dance!
textByHashes.acf93466d66f0276c574108c3e82c18ed4151960: Doing bow make you look like a wimp.
textByHashes.0de57e556a2da5a7279425a32753466293264463: Only if they wimpy tribes! Goblin salute strong!
textByHashes.00b1165823a79de88d76c7b6e2f8d6e632fc6c8f: They punished by Big High War-God.
textByHashes.fd6b2c23fd2db348d62b46ade7c651681610432e: Well we must have done! We goblins! Goblins always win!
textByHashes.6458df3a7d61e399d60d21aa148c3deeccc04b93: Human, what colour you think best?
textByHashes.862efd392ccf85a90da2bd098e1de1692492f899: Our soldiers need better weapons. We give them all warhammers!
textByHashes.47925493f17400576c1fa788d7eaa316aea25491: Axes stupid! They things you cut wood with!
textByHashes.2394cda231a701d0c679c3308e43815c6c315c1a: You not need sharp when you have strong goblin swinging big lump of iron!
textByHashes.7027b5927d5b7899a5c8581643e806b7bde5b8e6: Me not like worm stew! Tell him make beetle pie!
textByHashes.dfea286e2e55b5fb80f6d13ed6793f3b9c692698: When Chosen Commander come to speak to us again?
textByHashes.41ebb92a873672aa55f4c8b9119c5e77ca15b0c0: Yeah, as long as she agree with truths of Big High War God!
textByHashes.aaa010f1d5838869929d042562122269417a791c: Then she not come here again!
textByHashes.63757b3a48da708a4b032295d2efba01a8313964: That good. Big High War God smile on you now. You honourary goblin!
textByHashes.54d77dd97c40ff5275f9819ac8916f0955b6764e: You not have vision! You make that up!
textByHashes.725317aeab424bb14823a05fcfd4999530bed0f0: Well... I have vision too. Chosen commander say me big general!
textByHashes.4f41779ca9cb1250e7ba07ae067fe0d75218f4b9: Chosen commander also say you fat and stupid.
